description: Participant number (from subj_nr in original data)
Participant gender recoded from sex field (f → female; m → male)
Native language: 'English' for native speakers (age_en == 0); NaN for non-native speakers (native language not recorded)
1 if monolingual, 0 if multilingual (from monoling in original data)
Sentence number (sent_nr) — uniquely identifies each sentence stimulus
Position of sentence in the presentation sequence for this participant (sent_pos)
Full sentence text (from stimuli.txt joined on sent_nr)
The specific word on this row (one row per word per participant)
Position of this word within the sentence (1-indexed; word_pos in original data)
Comprehension question presented after the sentence; NaN if no question was asked

Participant's inferred response to the comprehension question: 'y' (yes) or 'n' (no), NaN if no question. Inferred from the correct-answer field (stimuli.txt) and trial accuracy (correct field in RT files).
Reading time in ms (exp1: key-press RT from self-paced reading; exp2: first fixation duration on this word). 0 ms replaced with NaN in exp2 (word not fixated before a rightward saccade).
First-pass reading time in ms: total fixation time on this word before first fixation on any other word. 0 replaced with NaN (word skipped on first pass).
Right-bounded reading time in ms: total fixation time before first fixation on any word to the right. 0 replaced with NaN.
Go-past reading time in ms: total fixation time from first fixation on this word until first fixation on any word to the right (includes regressions). 0 replaced with NaN.
Accuracy on the comprehension question for this sentence: 1.0 (correct), 0.0 (error), NaN if no question (from 'correct' column in RT files: c → 1.0, e → 0.0, - → NaN)
